causality: PWV anchors are aligned to native cadence and are never later than the final observed radar timestamp.

strata.weak_echo_nondecreasing: last observed radar tile is 1 mm/h to below the task threshold and is not lower than the mean of the first three observed frames
strata.radar_quiet: observed radar-history tile maximum is below 1 mm/h; diagnostic only

interpretation: A pass supports multi-hour PWV preconditioning for a restricted adapter. It is not final dense-forecast evidence.
